response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling as required
No evidence of deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture expertise
Educational background (BS only) lacks the required 8+ years of relevant technical experience in hardware/performance domains

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI accelerator or GPU optimization background
Mismatch between web/mobile focus and hardware-software co-design requirement
